description: Create a multi-modal commuter simulation for the Bologna Pasubio scenario using data from /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/. Define a route file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/commuters.rou.xml for at least three persons departing within the first 300 seconds, each performing a three-stage trip: walking to a bus stop, riding a bus line, and walking to a final destination. Create a simulation configuration at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/run_commuters.sumocfg that includes the base network (pasubio_buslanes.net.xml), necessary scenario additionals, base routes (pasubio.rou.xml, pasubio_busses.rou.xml), and the new commuters route file. Ensure the simulation generates trip metrics at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfo.xml and run the simulation to produce the output.
